response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols, and the resume misrepresents their name and contact details, raising red flags about attention to detail.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical documentation skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and conduct workshops on testing and development practices
concerns: No demonstrable professional C++ or STL experience in the last 9+ years
Absence of cloud, MQTT, REST, or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) exposure
Resume contains inconsistent name (Maria Rodriguez vs. Bogdan Szabo) and contact info

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or IEC 62443 background
